_comment: Reference only — the sync_uc_to_lakebase job builds this body per table from src/serving_tables.py and POSTs it to /api/2.0/postgres/synced_tables. Shown here so you can create/inspect one table by hand if needed: databricks postgres create-synced-table opennav_lakebase.public.jurisdictions --json @synced-table.example.json --profile opennav-prod
